hooks.command: $procs = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'ai-maptube' }; $count = ($procs | Measure-Object).Count; if ($count -gt 0) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "[hook] Killed $count Node process(es)" } else { Write-Host "[hook] No Node processes running" }

$procs = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'ai-maptube' }; $count = ($procs | Measure-Object).Count; if ($count -gt 0) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "[hook] Killed $count dev server process(es) before restart" } else { Write-Host "[hook] No dev server running" }
